sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check right panel state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

print("Right panel objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('R', 'b') and n['pixels'] > 10:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Check for white outline pixels on right panel
print("\nRight panel white pixels (outline check):")
white_on_right = []
for r in range(15, 40):
    for c in range(35, 56):
        if ascii_lines[r][c] == 'W':
            white_on_right.append((r, c))
print(f"  White pixels on right: {len(white_on_right)}")
if white_on_right:
    for r, c in white_on_right[:10]:
        print(f"    ({r}, {c})")

# Check left panel objects
print("\nLeft panel objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] not in ('c', 'B', 'G', 'W', 'g') and n['pixels'] > 1:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        if max(cols) < 30:  # left panel
            print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Now let's test: move green dot to different position and click red shape
# Current green dot: rows 42-43, cols 10-11
# Move to cols 12-13 (RIGHT)
result = action(['RIGHT'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"\nGreen dot after RIGHT: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
        break

# Click red shape
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 19, 'col': 48}])
print(f"\nAfter clicking red shape: board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")

# Check left panel
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nLeft panel objects after click:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] not in ('c', 'B', 'G', 'W', 'g') and n['pixels'] > 1:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        if max(cols) < 30:
            print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Check right panel white pixels
white_on_right = []
for r in range(15, 40):
    for c in range(35, 56):
        if ascii_lines[r][c] == 'W':
            white_on_right.append((r, c))
print(f"\nWhite pixels on right: {len(white_on_right)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
